task_completion.description: Create a new status label 'Pending E-Waste' of type 'Undeployable'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Status Labels settings page, there should be a row for 'Pending E-Waste' with the Status Type shown as 'Undeployable'.

task_completion.description: Create a new status label 'Donated' of type 'Archived'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Status Labels settings page, there should be a row for 'Donated' with the Status Type shown as 'Archived'.
In the Assets list or individual asset views, laptops with asset tags LT-RET-01, LT-RET-02, LT-RET-03, and LT-RET-04 should display the status 'Pending E-Waste'.
In the Assets list or individual asset views, tablets with asset tags TAB-RET-01, TAB-RET-02, and TAB-RET-03 should display the status 'Donated'.
In the individual asset details or a bulk edit screen for the tablets (TAB-RET-01 to TAB-RET-03), the Notes field must contain the exact text 'Donated to Lincoln High School'.

task_completion.description: Do not modify other retired equipment (Printers)
task_completion.visual_evidence: If visible in the Assets list, printers PRN-RET-01 and PRN-RET-02 should retain their original 'Retired' status and not be changed to 'Pending E-Waste' or 'Donated'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Snipe-IT web GUI (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than executing terminal commands or database queries to update assets.

integrity.description: Agent entered the donation note into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Donated to Lincoln High School' should be visible inside the Snipe-IT Notes input field or asset details page, not just in a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use automated scripts to bypass manual GUI steps
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, curl commands, or API calls being used in the terminal to create labels or update assets.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target assets for 'Pending E-Waste' status: Laptops LT-RET-01, LT-RET-02, LT-RET-03, LT-RET-04. Target assets for 'Donated' status: Tablets TAB-RET-01, TAB-RET-02, TAB-RET-03. Required donation note: 'Donated to Lincoln High School'. Control group (must remain unmodified): Printers PRN-RET-01, PRN-RET-02.
